events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Scenario: field method less tidy than preferred shop approach but matches listed product instructions and project requirement. No local amendment forbids. References NEC Art. 408, 110.26, 200.4. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since matches instructions and code, no defects, likely pass. Need fill fields. Work stage in-progress. Component conditions none flagged -> empty list. Percent complete maybe 70? Value 0. Sound_source etc default empty string/0. Order empty. Workable empty. Findings empty. Actions maybe none. Rationale: method is code-compliant and per manufacturer instructions; neatness preference not a code requirement. References NEC Art. 408, 110.26, 200.4. Risk low. Confidence high 0.95. Ensure valid JSON.
